headline: AppLovin Regulatory Scrutiny Raises Questions For Growth And Profitability
summary: AppLovin is the subject of an ongoing SEC investigation, adding a new regulatory overhang for the company. At the same time, global regulators are tightening oversight of app store rules, which could affect how AppLovin operates and works with partners. These developments raise questions around future compliance costs, disclosure obligations, and potential changes to industry business models. AppLovin, listed as NasdaqGS:APP, is drawing attention for reasons that go beyond its recent share...
